records.m_Talk_ENG: First and foremost, as the head of the executive committee, I'll report on the status of preparations for tomorrow's festival...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything is going smoothly overall, but a few clubs have filed some complaints.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Dans l'ensemble, les pr959paratifs se d959roulent sans accrocs. En revanche, certains clubs nous ont fait parvenir des r959clamations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. The members can each take charge of one and resolve the issues.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's it?! My guess is that they didn't scrub the pool hard enough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not true, Naielle. We take pool maintenance very seriously!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you'll know their situation better than any of us. Can you take care of this one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The photography club and art club have shared the gallery every festival. So those two are always bickering with each other.

records.m_Talk_FRA:
95
8 chaque gala, les clubs de photographie et de magie se partagent le hall d'exposition. Ce n'est pas la premi958re fois qu'un probl958me nous remonte 95p ce sujet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, the gallery space is limited, and we can't say yes to every request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might be a lot to handle, but could you take charge of this one?

8 moi ?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Naielle! What are you
8g

records.m_Talk_DEU: Von sch9582nen M95tdchen bis hin zu sinnlichen Damen! Das ist doch ein Schwimmclub-Caf959, nicht wahr?

root.m_Talk_ENG: First and foremost, as the head of the executive committee, I'll report on the status of preparations for tomorrow's festival...

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are asking us for help as they claim it will be difficult to run a cafe with the awful smell in the air.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's it?! My guess is that they didn't scrub the pool hard enough!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you'll know their situation better than any of us. Can you take care of this one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Leave it to me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The photography club and art club have shared the gallery every festival. So those two are always bickering with each other.

root.m_Talk_FRA:
95
8 chaque gala, les clubs de photographie et de magie se partagent le hall d'exposition. Ce n'est pas la premi958re fois qu'un probl958me nous remonte 95p ce sujet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, the gallery space is limited, and we can't say yes to every request.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Tout de m95xme, c'est l'occasion pour eux de d959voiler le r959sultat de leur travail sur l'ann959e pass959e ! L'id959al, ce serait que toutes les 97guvres puissent 95xtre expos959es...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly, Kallen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It might be a lot to handle, but could you take charge of this one?

root.m_Talk_FRA:
Comment ? 95
8 moi ?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, I like your active participation, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way the student representative would ever forget something this important! Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Naielle! What are you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was soll das denn hei959en, Naielle?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! Y-yup! It was a joke! Ah hah hah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you're all ready for it. Because we got something incredible to show you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, fine. We'll help them out in a bit. Naielle was so excited to become this year's student representative.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice to see everyone in harmony. Then, after we are all done with our tasks, let's help the two out with the campfire preparations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina? You haven't said a word. Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, they're going to operate a cafe here? But where is everyone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They said they couldn't cook with the awful stench, so they're all inside the practice room, preparing. Meanwhile, we have to find what's causing the smell.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Come to think of it, I think I smell oil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Let's scoop them out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ja. Lass uns zuerst das 95hl loswerden!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The oil's spreading! We need to act fast!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Elle s'agrandit 95p vue d'97gil, on ferait mieux de se d959p95xcher.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, Mina! You're not thinking of going in the pool like that, right?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Attends, Mina ! Tu comptes quand m95xme pas entrer dans l'eau dans cette tenue ?
